summary: Sprint 2 Booking Hold TTL + OOO/OOS Integration fully verified. All 32 tests pass (10 Sprint 2 unit tests + 10 Sprint 1 booking integrity regression + 12 Sprint 2 API tests). Booking holds with TTL, confirm/release, sweep, and PMS room blocks INV-5 integration all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Booking Hold Service (core/booking_hold_service.py) correctly implements TTL-based holds with create, confirm, release, and sweep operations
Hold locks use lock_type='hold' with hold_expires_at field in room_night_locks collection
Confirm operation upgrades lock_type from 'hold' to 'booking' and removes hold_expires_at
Sweep operation finds expired holds, releases locks, and updates booking status to 'hold_expired'
Background sweeper runs every 60 seconds as asyncio task
Booking Holds REST API (routers/booking_holds.py) exposes all hold operations with proper auth
PMS Room Blocks (create_room_block_service.py line ~85) correctly writes to room_night_locks for INV-5
PMS Room Blocks (release_room_block_service.py line ~89) correctly releases from room_night_locks for INV-5
Room Blocks REST API (routers/room_blocks.py) provides OOO/OOS/maintenance management using same room_night_locks table
All timeline audit events properly logged for hold_created, hold_confirmed, hold_released, hold_expired stages

success_rate.backend: 100% - 32/32 tests passed (10 Sprint 2 unit + 10 Sprint 1 regression + 12 Sprint 2 API)

seed_data_creation: Test holds and room blocks created during tests with unique year ranges (2100+) to avoid collisions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 2 Booking Hold TTL + OOO/OOS Integration fully implemented and tested. Key features: (1) Booking Hold Service with TTL-based holds, (2) Hold confirm/release/sweep operations, (3) Background sweeper for expired holds, (4) REST API for all hold operations, (5) PMS room blocks write to room_night_locks (INV-5). All 32 tests pass.

post_create_hold.notes: Creates hold with TTL, returns nights_held and hold_expires_at

post_confirm_hold.notes: Upgrades lock_type from 'hold' to 'booking', removes hold_expires_at

post_sweep.notes: Manual trigger for expired hold cleanup

hold_blocks_booking.notes: Hold prevents regular booking on same room+dates (409)

hold_blocks_another_hold.notes: Two holds on same room+dates conflict (409)

release_then_booking_succeeds.notes: After releasing hold, booking on same dates succeeds

hold_create_with_ttl.notes: Hold created with configurable TTL (default 15 min)

sweep_releases_expired.notes: Sweeper releases expired holds and updates booking status

sweep_ignores_confirmed.notes: Sweeper does not touch confirmed booking locks

ooo_blocks_booking.notes: OOO room blocks booking attempt returns 409

idempotency_key.notes: Same idempotency key does not create duplicate
